purpose: Normal-map baking/detail projection reference for the Town Portal procedural runtime effect.

coordinateSpace.origin: portal tile center at ground contact
coordinateSpace.axes: x horizontal screen-local, y vertical above ground, z depth toward/away camera
coordinateSpace.footprint: matches V0.14.91 portal trigger/visual scale; runtime size and timing preserved

style.mood: safe passage, reliable arcane teleportation, non-sinister
style.motionLanguage: calm breathing pulse, clockwork rune orbit, layered inward swirls, gentle collapse

topologyRequirements.ring: all-quad braided elliptical tube strands with circumference edge flow
topologyRequirements.interior: concentric radial quad topology with inward spiral edge flow
topologyRequirements.particles: runtime motes remain efficient point/strip primitives; mesh reference includes modeled rune geometry

animationTimingBinding.open: 0.36s visual ease-in, same portal activation behavior
animationTimingBinding.idle: existing sustained portal loop; added breathing pulse without changing trigger timing
animationTimingBinding.entry: 0.42s ripple/flash overlay; teleport still resolves immediately through existing portal use path
animationTimingBinding.collapse: 0.52s visual transient after link closes; no gameplay delay

portal_ring_braided_strand_1.topology: closed all-quad elliptical tube; circumference edge flow

portal_ring_braided_strand_2.topology: closed all-quad elliptical tube; circumference edge flow

portal_ring_braided_strand_3.topology: closed all-quad elliptical tube; circumference edge flow

portal_ring_braided_strand_4.topology: closed all-quad elliptical tube; circumference edge flow

portal_ring_braided_strand_5.topology: closed all-quad elliptical tube; circumference edge flow

portal_interior_radial_spiral.topology: quad radial rings; inward spiral edge flow; central tunnel depth

ground_runic_light_annulus.topology: flat all-quad annular rings; rune decals modeled as separate quad strips

orbital_rune_geometry.topology: individual all-quad glyph bars; runtime orbits preserve original timing

quadFormat: indices into vertices, counter-clockwise where applicable
